User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching Firebase Auth UID.

tokens.description: The number of tokens the user has available for asking questions.

package.description: The subscription package the user is currently on.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

targetExam.description: The exam the user is preparing for.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question asked by a user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who asked the question.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded question image.

questionText.description: The text extracted from the image or typed by the user.

answerText.description: The answer provided by the AI model.

status.description: The current status of the question.

model.description: The AI model used to solve the question.

cost.description: The cost of solving the question in tokens.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the question was asked.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a payment made by a user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who made the payment.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the payment was initiated.

totalVisits.description: Total number of visits (global doc only).

totalLoggedInVisits.description: Total number of logged-in visits (global doc only).

visits.description: Number of visits for a specific day (daily doc only).

loggedInVisits.description: Number of logged-in visits for a specific day (daily doc only).

date.description: The date string for daily records (YYYY-MM-DD).

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Document ID must match the user's Auth UID.

/analytics/{docId}.description: Stores global and daily visit analytics.
